emails.subject: contact names
emails.body: There are two deals that do not have contact names. Can you check with the trader and get him to enter names. The confirmation has to have a contact name or it cannot be prepared. Thanks! Deals #500465 and #500467

emails.subject: Re: contact names
emails.body: Re: contact names I see that both of these deals have counterparty contact names in them now did this get taken care of by somebody else? I'm sorry for the late response I was out sick on Friday. Let me know if there's something else I can do on these deals. Kate From: Sharen Cason 01/19/2001 06:48 AM
